articles.headline: Al Jazeera sees bombs being loaded onto US planes at UK base
articles.excerpt: An Al Jazeera crew filmed bunker-busting bombs being loaded onto US military planes at a UK military base.

articles.headline: Saudi Arabia and UAE condemn Iranian attacks

articles.headline: Bangladesh parliament meets after uprising, elections ushered in new gov’t

articles.excerpt: Countries such as Indonesia and Vietnam heavily depend on fuel imports and have limited energy reserves.

articles.headline: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC

articles.headline: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters

articles.headline: EU and UK demand Israel stop surge in West Bank settler violence since…

articles.headline: Chinese national arrested over attempt to smuggle 2,000 queen ants from…

articles.headline: Why Namibia's green energy dream could be a red flag for penguins
articles.excerpt: A near pristine desert and coastal wilderness in Namibia could soon host a huge hydrogen production facility.

articles.headline: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR…

articles.headline: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 60
articles.excerpt: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

articles.headline: US launches probe into trading partners including the EU, China and India
articles.excerpt: The move comes weeks after the US Supreme Court struck down a key part of Trump's tariffs policies.

articles.headline: Three brothers arrested after explosion at US embassy in Oslo

articles.headline: Ukraine says it has hit Russian 'missile component' plant

articles.headline: Most underrated player on the planet? Valverde steps up for Real

articles.headline: No evidence Swiss bus fire was terrorism, officials say
articles.excerpt: Initial reports suggest a man with "psychological problems" set himself on fire on the bus, according to police.

articles.headline: Russia's deportation of Ukrainian children amounts to crime against…
articles.excerpt: Vladimir Putin's direct involvement in the forcible deportation of Ukrainian children has been visible from the outset, the UN says.

articles.headline: US inflation stable ahead of Iran shock
articles.excerpt: With energy prices jumping, analysts say the report might be viewed as a "historical artefact".

articles.headline: Kanye West ordered to pay $140K in Malibu mansion renovation lawsuit
articles.excerpt: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.

articles.headline: Big Tech backs Anthropic in fight against Trump administration
articles.excerpt: A group representing tech giants called government action against Anthropic a "temper tantrum".

articles.headline: Carney inches closer to majority, as fourth MP defects to Liberals
articles.excerpt: Lori Idlout, formerly of the NDP, has become the latest lawmaker in the current parliament to cross the floor.

articles.headline: Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showing customers other users'…
articles.excerpt: The Lloyds Banking Group customers reported being able to view payments and charges from other sources.

articles.headline: John Lewis to pay first staff bonus for four years

articles.headline: Welsh Water to pay £45m after 'unacceptable' sewage failures
articles.excerpt: The water supplier is set to pay a proposed £44.7m after "serious and unacceptable" sewage breaches.

articles.headline: What role has cyber warfare played in Iran?

articles.headline: A small US grocer is calling out the lower prices at big chains
articles.excerpt: It is 'impossible for us to compete', says the boss of a New York grocery store.

articles.headline: Social media firms asked to toughen up age checks for under-13s

articles.headline: Three Bitcoin Binance charts reveal the setup behind the next big move

articles.headline: Bitcoin rebounds on flat US CPI as oil price cools on 400M barrel release

articles.headline: Bitcoin will need 17% of ‘store of value’ market to hit $1M: Bitwise
articles.excerpt: Bitcoin doesn't need to take 50% of gold's market share to reach one million dollars per coin if one is looking into the next 10 years, argues Bitwise's Matt Hougan.

articles.headline: Ether funding rate flips negative: Are ETH bears back in control?
articles.excerpt: Bearish Ether derivatives data and slowing network use weigh on ETH price, even as developers plan for faster transactions and more flexible wallet fees.

articles.headline: Hyperliquid's HYPE price will increase by August, predicts Arthur Hayes

articles.headline: Was Ethereum 'ultrasound money' a mistake? ETH down 65% vs. BTC since pivot
articles.excerpt: Ethereum has failed to remain deflationary since the switch to Proof-of-Stake, as ETH's price has disappointed Ether investors, particularly against Bitcoin.

articles.headline: Utah set to block prediction markets as state-federal tensions rise

articles.headline: US prosecutors urge judge to deny Sam Bankman-Fried retrial bid: Report
articles.excerpt: Prosecutors say testimony from two former FTX executives cited by the defense does not qualify as newly discovered evidence, Bloomberg reported.

articles.headline: Ghana greenlights 11 crypto companies for regulatory sandbox
articles.excerpt: Ghana’s SEC could grant a full license to sandbox participants as early as six months, provided that their products are market-ready and that they tick all regulatory boxes.

articles.headline: FDIC chair says no deposit insurance for stablecoins under GENIUS Act

articles.headline: US Senate bill targets prediction markets on war and assassinations

articles.headline: Crypto, banks need to be a ‘bit unhappy’ for bill to advance: Senator

articles.excerpt: LITRO aims to modernize the $6 trillion oil market by replacing slow, paper-based settlement with 24/7, on-chain trading and redemption.

articles.headline: Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
articles.excerpt: Brent crude surged 10% after attacks on two oil tankers in Iraqi waters, with the prompt spread hitting levels not seen in years and MSCI Asia Pacific stocks falling 1.8%.

articles.headline: Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
articles.excerpt: The operator, known as Tom, said only users who signed a fake terms-of-service message on the compromised site after the breach were affected.

articles.headline: SEC, CFTC Strike Pact to Coordinate Crypto Rules and Oversight
articles.excerpt: The agencies have moved to coordinate oversight, in a bid to end years of regulatory overlap on the treatment of crypto.

articles.headline: Hackers Hijack Bonk.fun Domain, Deploy Wallet-Draining Phishing Prompt
articles.excerpt: Browser warnings flagged the site for suspected phishing after attackers pushed a fake TOS message designed to trick users.

articles.headline: Crypto Traders Turn to Hyperliquid for Oil Bets Amid Iran Volatility
articles.excerpt: Nearly $1 billion in synthetic oil futures were traded on Wednesday amid reactions to geopolitical tensions and fears of future price spikes.

articles.headline: Grammarly Disables AI 'Expert Review' After Backlash From Authors and…
articles.excerpt: Grammarly said it will rethink the tool after criticism that it used real experts—including some who are deceased—without consent.

articles.headline: Microsoft Sides With Anthropic Against Trump Admin’s Supply Chain Risk…
articles.excerpt: Microsoft filed a court brief backing Anthropic's lawsuit against the Pentagon—a move that reveals just how much the tech giant has riding on Claude's survival.

articles.headline: Wells Fargo Applies for WFUSD Trademark, Signaling Use in Crypto and…
articles.excerpt: Wells Fargo has applied for a trademark for "WFUSD" for potential use in service categories that mention crypto and stablecoins.

articles.headline: Android Phone Crypto Wallets Could Be at Risk Due to MediaTek Exploit…
articles.excerpt: A vulnerability in some MediaTek-powered phones could allow attackers to extract encrypted data, including wallet seed phrases, using only a USB connection.
